calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kenneth Tsang, Esq. 415-636-1323 Specially appearing for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES. LLC's Motion To Vacate Judgment.

Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates, LLC's motion to vacate judgment against Augusto Figuerola is granted. Portfolio indicates it wishes to dismiss its case against Figuerola and may do so by filing a dismissal.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2015 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Continued To Nov-03-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
